---
title: "Pol Carbó Mestre"
image: "pol.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/polcarbo/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/PCarbMest"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/pcarbomestre"
  - label: Email
    url: "pcarbomestre@bren.ucsb.edu"
output:
  postcards::jolla
site: distill::distill_website
---

I am a UCSB student in a Master of Environmental Science and Management at the Bren School.
Currently diving into the data science underworld, and apparently learning website coding with R language. I love political memes and not making myself understand with my thick Spanish accent.
